# Guarantee Sources Index

| Source | URL | Use |
|---|---|---|
| [Google Ads API Experiments](./001_google_ads_api_experiments.md) | https://developers.google.com/google-ads/api/docs/experiments/overview | Use for API-ready campaign experiment planning. |
| [Google Ads Experiments Help](./002_google_ads_experiments_help.md) | https://support.google.com/google-ads/answer/10682377 | Use when deciding whether Google-native experimentation is available. |
| [Meta Conversion Lift](./003_meta_conversion_lift.md) | https://www.facebook.com/business/measurement/conversion-lift | Use for causal impact tests instead of dashboard-only attribution. |
| [TikTok Split Testing](./004_tiktok_split_testing.md) | https://ads.tiktok.com/help/article/split-testing?lang=en | Use for fast creative and targeting isolation. |
| [TikTok Measurement Best Practices](./005_tiktok_measurement_best_practices.md) | https://ads.tiktok.com/help/article/best-practices-for-measurement | Use as platform-specific measurement reminder. |
| [LinkedIn Conversion Lift Testing](./006_linkedin_conversion_lift.md) | https://www.linkedin.com/help/lms/answer/a7413311 | Use for B2B causal measurement. |
| [LinkedIn Brand Lift Testing](./007_linkedin_brand_lift.md) | https://www.linkedin.com/help/lms/answer/a419978 | Use when campaign objective is consideration or awareness. |
| [Lewis, Rao, Reiley - Measuring the Effects of Advertising](./008_lewis_rao_reiley_digital_frontier.md) | https://www.nber.org/system/files/working_papers/w19520/w19520.pdf | Use as anti-dashboard-delusion foundation. |
| [Blake, Nosko, Tadelis - eBay paid search field experiment](./009_ebay_paid_search_experiment.md) | https://faculty.haas.berkeley.edu/stadelis/BNT_ECMA_rev.pdf | Use as warning against branded-search and last-click illusions. |
| [Sethuraman, Tellis, Briesch - Advertising elasticity meta-analysis](./010_sethuraman_tellis_briesch_meta_analysis.md) | https://gwern.net/doc/economics/advertising/2011-sethuraman.pdf | Use to calibrate expectations. |
| [ACCC - False or misleading claims](./011_accc_false_misleading_claims.md) | https://www.accc.gov.au/consumers/advertising-and-promotions/false-or-misleading-claims | Use for product-truth harness rules. |
| [FTC - Deceptive AI claims and schemes](./012_ftc_deceptive_ai_claims.md) | https://www.ftc.gov/news-events/news/press-releases/2024/09/ftc-announces-crackdown-deceptive-ai-claims-schemes | Use when marketing AI products or AI-powered results. |
| [Nielsen Norman Group - Banner Blindness Revisited](./013_nng_banner_blindness.md) | https://www.nngroup.com/articles/banner-blindness-old-and-new-findings/ | Use for skeptical-buyer and proof-path design. |
| [HBR - Jobs to Be Done](./014_hbr_jobs_to_be_done.md) | https://hbr.org/2016/09/know-your-customers-jobs-to-be-done | Use to generate buyer-state and offer hypotheses. |
| [OpenAI Codex CLI](./015_openai_codex_cli.md) | https://developers.openai.com/codex/cli | Use for Markdown repo execution and artifact generation. |
| [Claude Code Subagents](./016_claude_code_subagents.md) | https://code.claude.com/docs/en/sub-agents | Use to structure specialist marketing agents. |
| [Anthropic - Building Effective Agents](./017_anthropic_building_effective_agents.md) | https://www.anthropic.com/research/building-effective-agents | Use for loop design and avoiding overcomplex frameworks. |
| [OpenAI - Practical Guide to Building Agents](./018_openai_practical_agents.md) | https://openai.com/business/guides-and-resources/a-practical-guide-to-building-ai-agents/ | Use for building reliable Claude/Codex-style marketing systems. |
| [TikTok API for Business](./019_tiktok_api_for_business.md) | https://ads.tiktok.com/help/article/marketing-api?lang=en | Use for platform automation planning. |
| [Google Ads AI Max for Search](./020_google_ai_max_search.md) | https://developers.google.com/google-ads/api/docs/campaigns/ai-max-for-search-campaigns/getting-started | Use as a source for AI-assisted search campaign automation. |
